summary: Fixed the BUTTON_USER_INVALID error by adding validation for user IDs before creating inline buttons. Added checks to ensure user IDs are within valid range (less than 1 billion) before creating tg://user buttons, preventing the bot API error when dealing with invalid user IDs.
current_status: The bot now validates user IDs before creating inline buttons, preventing BUTTON_USER_INVALID errors that were occurring when trying to create buttons for invalid or non-existent users.
